config.script:
system.perspective.print("inside def:")
	from java.util import Calendar
	from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
	from java.util import Date
	from datetime import datetime, timedelta
	#from com.inductiveautomation.ignition.common.util import Dataset
	
	try:
		system.perspective.print("inside try:")
	    # Get fromDate from the DateTimeInput component
		fromDate =self.getSibling("DateTimeInput").props.value
		#fromDate = datetime.strptime(fromDate, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f")
		system.perspective.print("FromDate: " + str(fromDate))
	
	    # Create a Calendar instance and set the fromDate
		calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
		calendar.setTime(fromDate)
	
	    # Add 1 day to the fromDate
		calendar.add(Calendar.DATE, 1)
		calendar.set(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY, 7)
		calendar.set(Calendar.MINUTE, 29)
		calendar.set(Calendar.SECOND, 59)
		toDate = calendar.getTime()
	
	    # Format the toDate to match the required format
		dateFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS")
	 	toDate = dateFormat.format(toDate)
   		fromDate = dateFormat.format(fromDate)
	
	 	system.perspective.print("Formatted FromDate: " + str(fromDate))
   		system.perspective.print("Formatted ToDate: " + toDate)
	
	    # Run the named query
	    #DH WM
		system.perspective.print("before query1")
		colsDHWM = system.db.runNamedQuery(
	        'Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',
	        {'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 278}
	    )
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: " + str(colsDHWM))
	    # Assign the result to the table
		self.parent.getChild("tblDHWM").getChild("tblDHWM").props.data = colsDHWM
		#MAin line WM
		colsMLWM= system.db.runNamedQuery(
					        'Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',
					        {'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 374
					        }
					    )
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsMLWM " + str(colsMLWM))
		self.parent.getChild("tblMLWM").getChild("tblMLWM").props.data=colsMLWM
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsMLWM " + str(colsMLWM))
		
		colsLDQG=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 291})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsLDQG " + str(colsLDQG))
		self.parent.getChild("tblLDQG").getChild("tblLDQG").props.data=colsLDQG
	    
		colsMLQG1=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 280})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsMLQG1 " + str(colsMLQG1))
		self.parent.getChild("tblMLQG1").getChild("tblMLQG1").props.data=colsMLQG1
		
		colsHUBWM=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 268})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsHUBWM " + str(colsHUBWM))
		self.parent.getChild("tblHUBWM").getChild("tblHUBWM").props.data=colsHUBWM
		
		colsMLQG2=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 331})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsMLQG2 " + str(colsMLQG2))
		self.parent.getChild("tblMLQG2").getChild("tblMLQG2").props.data=colsMLQG2
		
		colsHDQG=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 377})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsHDQG " + str(colsHDQG))
		self.parent.getChild("tblHDQG").getChild("tblHDQG").props.data=colsHDQG
		
		colsOIL=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 324})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsOIL " + str(colsOIL))
		self.parent.getChild("tblOIL").getChild("tblOIL").props.data=colsOIL
	    
		colsHUBQG=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 306})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsHUBQG " + str(colsHUBQG))
		self.parent.getChild("tblHUBQG").getChild("tblHUBQG").props.data=colsHUBQG
		
		colsPDI=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDate, 'ToDate': toDate, 'WorkStation': 332})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsPDI " + str(colsPDI))
		self.parent.getChild("tblPDI").getChild("tblPDI").props.data=colsPDI
	    
	   
		# Get fromDate from the DateTimeInput component
		fromDate = self.getSibling("DateTimeInput").props.value
		system.perspective.print("Raw fromDate: " + str(fromDate))
		system.perspective.print("Type of fromDate: " + str(type(fromDate)))
		
		# Prepare a Calendar instance
		calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
		
		if isinstance(fromDate, str):
		    # If fromDate is a string, parse it to java.util.Date
		    dateFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'")  # Adjust format if needed
		    parsedFromDate = dateFormat.parse(fromDate)
		    calendar.setTime(parsedFromDate)
		elif isinstance(fromDate, Date):
		    # If fromDate is already a java.util.Date, directly set it
		    calendar.setTime(fromDate)
		else:
		    raise TypeError("Unexpected type for fromDate: " + str(type(fromDate)))
		
		# Get the first day of the current month
		calendar.set(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH, 1)
		fromDateCurrentMonth = calendar.getTime()
		
		# Get the first day of the next month
		calendar.add(Calendar.MONTH, 1)
		fromDateNextMonth = calendar.getTime()
		
		# Format the dates back to strings
		outputFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS")
		fromDateCurrentMonthStr = outputFormat.format(fromDateCurrentMonth)
		fromDateNextMonthStr = outputFormat.format(fromDateNextMonth)
		
		# Print the results
		system.perspective.print("FromDateCurrentMonth: " + fromDateCurrentMonthStr)
		system.perspective.print("FromDateNextMonth: " + fromDateNextMonthStr)
		
		colsMTD=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/ProductionStatus/getData',{'FromDate': fromDateCurrentMonthStr, 'ToDate': fromDateNextMonthStr, 'WorkStation': 332})
		system.perspective.print("Query Result: colsMTD " + str(colsMTD))
		self.parent.getChild("tblMTD").getChild("tblMTD").props.data=colsMTD
		
		#Selected month name is string
		fromDate = self.getSibling("DateTimeInput").props.value
		system.perspective.print("FromDate: " + str(fromDate))
		
		# Format the fromDate directly to extract the month name
		monthFormat = SimpleDateFormat("MMMM")
		selectMonth = monthFormat.format(fromDate)
		
		system.perspective.print("Selected Month: " + selectMonth)
		self.parent.getChild("tblMTD").getChild("Label").position.display=True
		self.parent.getChild("tblMTD").getChild("Label").props.text=selectMonth
		

		
    			   		    	    		
	    
	   	
	   		
	   	
	    
	except Exception as e:
	    system.perspective.print("Error: " + str(e))
	except ValueError as ve:
	    system.perspective.print("ValueError: " + str(ve))
